articles.title: 'No noise, no fun' - Rohit shrugs off retirement chatter after Lord's 138
articles.description: "There's not been any discussion like that in the team," Shubman Gill says when asked about Rohit Sharma's international future

articles.title: Hridoy pleased with T20I series win despite 'injuries and limited options'
articles.description: Bangladesh were without Mustafizur Rahman and Shoriful Islam for the entire series, and lost Nahid Rana for the decider, which they won by four wickets

articles.title: Jangoo: West Indies 'don't deserve' to be in World Cup qualifiers
articles.description: A one-wicket defeat in Barbados was West Indies' third loss in a row and a "difficult pill to swallow", as Amir Jangoo put it

articles.title: Gill puts spotlight on India's fitness record
articles.description: India's captain said the squad will need greater resilience for when next year's World Cup comes around

articles.title: Duckett 141 trumps Rohit 138 in Lord's run-fest
articles.description: England set India 388 in this series decider, and then refused to blink with the ball to secure a 2-1 series win - their first against India since 2018

articles.title: Chapman, Santner star in low-scoring thriller as NZ take series
articles.description: The visitors just about held their nerve in a chase of 189 to take an unassailable 3-1 lead in the ODI series

articles.title: Bangladesh win dramatic finale to clinch T20I series against Zimbabwe
articles.description: Tanzid Hasan anchored the chase with a half-century as Bangladesh won with two balls to spare

articles.title: New Zealand bowl with Mitchell injured; West Indies make four changes
articles.description: Greaves, Jangoo, Forde, and Seales replaced Campbell, Hetmyer, Paul and Pierre

articles.title: Zimbabwe opt to bat in series decider
articles.description: Bangladesh were without Nahid Rana, who suffered a side strain on Friday

articles.title: Manjot Kalra denies fixing allegations in LPL 2026
articles.description: Former India Under-19 player Manjot Kalra has been remanded until July 31 in Colombo

articles.title: 'We've played our entire career together' - Rohit Sharma on astonishing partnership with Virat Kohli
articles.description: Rohit Sharma and Virat Kohli added yet another milestone to their illustrious careers, becoming the first Indian pair to complete 400 international appearances together

articles.title: 'You want to be challenged all the time' - Rohit Sharma after magnificent century at Lord's
articles.description: Rohit became the first Indian batter to record an ODI century at Lord's, adding another feather to an already packed cap.

articles.title: 'We are not winning anything' - Aakash Chopra cuts a sorry figure after India's ODI series defeat to England
articles.description: India have had a disastrous tour of the British Isles, first losing the T20I series against Ireland and then finishing second in both white-ball series against England.

articles.title: 'We don't deserve to be going to the qualifiers' - Amir Jangoo after nervy one wicket loss in the fourth ODI
articles.description: The team in maroon were bowled out in 44.4 overs, making this the third match in succession where they have failed to bat their quota of 50 overs.

articles.title: 'He'd be a really good coach' - Darren Lehmann backs former Australia teammate as next England Test coach
articles.description: The former Australia all-rounder also insisted that he is happy with the current role as Northamptonshire coach.

articles.title: Stats: Virat Kohli & Rohit Sharma create international appearances record for India
articles.description: Despite the pair ending the game on the losing side, both former captains played their 400th international game together, becoming the first Indian duo to accomplish this feat.

articles.title: ENG vs IND 2026: England vs India, 3rd ODI - Who Said What?
articles.description: England defeated India by 27 runs in the decisive third ODI to bag the three-match series 2-1 on Sunday, July 19.

articles.title: ENG vs IND 2026: England vs India Highlights & Review – 3rd ODI
articles.description: England produced a commanding batting display to post a daunting 387/3 before restricting India to 360/7 to seal a thrilling 27-run victory and clinch the three-match series 2-1.

articles.title: Rohit Sharma scores a historic Lord's century with Shardul Thakur's bat
articles.description: During his breathtaking knock, few viewers noticed that Rohit was not using one of his regular bats.

articles.title: [WATCH] Teary-eyed Ritika Sajdeh reacts after Rohit Sharma's historic Lord's century
articles.description: The emotional reaction quickly went viral on social media, with fans celebrating both Rohit's landmark innings and the heartfelt moment shared by his family.
